title: FF support in WREDUCE causes Murax sythesis to fail with ERROR
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Commit 7bf4e4a1855df442191e3d1cc28eeda7e01d051c this issue does not occur
Commit 246391200e3e0d47ee571d4d77dd0744dba0e164 this issue does occur

Replication instructions:
1. unzip attach [failing_ilang.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/2894932/failing_ilang.zip)
2. Run following yosys commands:
```
read_ilang t2.ilang
synth -run coarse
```
3. Yosys terminates on 246391200e3e0d47ee571d4d77dd0744dba0e164 and later with following output:

```
ERROR: Found error in internal cell $techmap\murax.system_cpu.$procdff$2554 ($adff) at kernel/rtlil.cc:709:
  attribute \src "/usr/local/google/home/keithrothman/cat_x/symbiflow-arch-defs/build/soc_tests/murax/basys3_toplevel.v:27|/usr/local/google/home/keithrothman/cat_x/symbiflow-arch-defs/build/soc_tests/murax/Murax.v:4232|/usr/local/google/home/keithrothman/cat_x/symbiflow-arch-defs/build/soc_tests/murax/Murax.v:2554"
  cell $adff $techmap\murax.system_cpu.$procdff$2554
    parameter \ARST_POLARITY 1'1
    parameter \ARST_VALUE 0
    parameter \CLK_POLARITY 1'1
    parameter \WIDTH 15
    connect \ARST \murax.resetCtrl_systemReset
    connect \CLK \io_mainClk
    connect \D \murax.system_cpu.execute_to_memory_INSTRUCTION [14:0]
    connect \Q \murax.system_cpu.memory_to_writeBack_INSTRUCTION [14:0]
  end
```

## Expected behavior

If input ilang is valid, then "synth -run coarse" should complete without error.  If input ilang is invalid, unclear why previous versions of yosys ran without error.

## Actual behavior

Yosys terminates with following error:
```
ERROR: Found error in internal cell $techmap\murax.system_cpu.$procdff$2554 ($adff) at kernel/rtlil.cc:709:
  attribute \src "/usr/local/google/home/keithrothman/cat_x/symbiflow-arch-defs/build/soc_tests/murax/basys3_toplevel.v:27|/usr/local/google/home/keithrothman/cat_x/symbiflow-arch-defs/build/soc_tests/murax/Murax.v:4232|/usr/local/google/home/keithrothman/cat_x/symbiflow-arch-defs/build/soc_tests/murax/Murax.v:2554"
  cell $adff $techmap\murax.system_cpu.$procdff$2554
    parameter \ARST_POLARITY 1'1
    parameter \ARST_VALUE 0
    parameter \CLK_POLARITY 1'1
    parameter \WIDTH 15
    connect \ARST \murax.resetCtrl_systemReset
    connect \CLK \io_mainClk
    connect \D \murax.system_cpu.execute_to_memory_INSTRUCTION [14:0]
    connect \Q \murax.system_cpu.memory_to_writeBack_INSTRUCTION [14:0]
  end
```
